SOURCE: PDE and plan characteristics (derived) 

VALUES: Null 
1–7 = The tier on the plan's formulary associated with the drug on the PDE 
(NOTE: if the plan is not required to submit a formulary then TIER_ID is assigned a value of '1') 

COMMENT: Part D plan sponsors submit the pricing, tiers, and formularies for their plan benefit packages to CMS 
via the Health Plan Management System (HPMS). 

This includes information on how many cost-sharing tiers each plan will use and the drugs that
